title: Launch HN: Transload (YC P26) – Measuring freight items with CCTV
description: Hi HN — we’re Julius, Jago, and Nils, and we’re building transload (transload.io). transload helps LTL trucking companies measure freight dimensions using the security cameras already installed in their terminals. Instead of sending shipments through a dedicated dimensioning station, we measure them automatically as they move through the normal dock workflow.
